results.rendered_html:
ajayya (3. a + jayya) adj.
1〉 unbesiegbar  R. 2,11,7 . 35,7 . sa (dānavagaṇaḥ) kila śatakratorajayyaḥ  ŚĀK. 157 .
— 2〉 ungewinnbar, was nicht abgewonnen werden dürfte (im Spiele): ajayyaṃ jigāya tān  VOP. 5,6 .

results.rendered_html:
ajayya a. [na. ta.]
1 Invincible; sakhyuste sa kila śatakratorajayyaḥ  Ś. 6. 29 ,  R. 18. 8. 
2 Not proper to be won at play; ˚yyaṃ jigāya tān  Bopadeva .
